name: Whisper
description: Speech-to-text transcription via any OpenAI-compatible Whisper API

apiKey.description: API key for the Whisper-compatible endpoint

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Whisper-compatible API (e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1, https://api.groq.com/openai/v1, or self-hosted)

url.description: URL of the audio file to transcribe

language.description: ISO-639-1 language code (optional, auto-detected if omitted)

instructions:
Whisper integration for speech-to-text transcription. Compatible with any OpenAI Whisper API endpoint (OpenAI, Groq, Azure, Faster-Whisper, etc.).

The `transcribe` action accepts an audio URL (nonce download URL or any HTTP URL) and returns the transcribed text. Supports all common audio formats: OGG, MP3, WAV, M4A, WEBM, FLAC.

Configure `baseUrl` to point to your provider:
- OpenAI: https://api.openai.com/v1
- Groq: https://api.groq.com/openai/v1
- Self-hosted Faster-Whisper: http://your-host:8000/v1

No per-user authentication required — uses platform API key.
